title: toona mannii
intro: Toona mannii, also known as the white toon, is a species of tree native to New Guinea. The bark and leaves of the Toona mannii plant have been traditionally used in folk medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a tonic to improve overall health. Toona mannii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for medicinal purposes.
